reason: Create real pgTable definition for SessionShareTable
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/share/share.pg.sql.ts b/packages/opencode/src/share/share.pg.sql.ts
index 30571386f..3246a6a13 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/share/share.pg.sql.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/share/share.pg.sql.ts
@@ -1 +1,13 @@
-export { SessionShareTable } from "./share.sql"
+import { pgTable, text } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core"
+import { SessionTable } from "../session/session.pg.sql"
+import { TimestampsPg } from "../storage/schema.pg.sql"
+
+export const SessionShareTable = pgTable("session_share", {
+  session_id: text()
+    .primaryKey()
+    .references(() => SessionTable.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
+  id: text().notNull(),
+  secret: text().notNull(),
+  url: text().notNull(),
+  ...TimestampsPg,
+})

reason: Create real pgTable definitions for account module (3 tables)
diff_snapshot:
diff --git a/packages/opencode/src/account/account.pg.sql.ts b/packages/opencode/src/account/account.pg.sql.ts
index 8a2f64167..8e66d37de 100644
--- a/packages/opencode/src/account/account.pg.sql.ts
+++ b/packages/opencode/src/account/account.pg.sql.ts
@@ -1 +1,39 @@
-export { AccountTable, AccountStateTable, ControlAccountTable } from "./account.sql"
+import { pgTable, text, integer, primaryKey, boolean } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core"
+
+import { type AccessToken, type AccountID, type OrgID, type RefreshToken } from "./schema"
+import { TimestampsPg } from "../storage/schema.pg.sql"
+
+export const AccountTable = pgTable("account", {
+  id: text().$type<AccountID>().primaryKey(),
+  email: text().notNull(),
+  url: text().notNull(),
+  access_token: text().$type<AccessToken>().notNull(),
+  refresh_token: text().$type<RefreshToken>().notNull(),
+  token_expiry: integer(),
+  ...TimestampsPg,
+})

+import { ProjectTable } from "../project/project.pg.sql"
+import type { ProjectID } from "../project/schema"
+import type { WorkspaceID } from "./schema"
+
+export const WorkspaceTable = pgTable("workspace", {
+  id: text().$type<WorkspaceID>().primaryKey(),
+  type: text().notNull(),
+  name: text().notNull().default(""),
+  branch: text(),
+  directory: text(),
+  extra: jsonb(),
+  project_id: text()
+    .$type<ProjectID>()

+import type { ProjectID } from "./schema"
+
+export const ProjectTable = pgTable("project", {
+  id: text().$type<ProjectID>().primaryKey(),
+  worktree: text().notNull(),

+  icon_color: text(),
+  ...TimestampsPg,
